mapper.select: select `user_account`,`user_name` ,`birthday`,`phone`,`email`, `account_type`,`account_status`,`risk_level_id`,`first_deposit_time`, `first_deposit_amount`,`last_login_time`,`offline_days`,`register_time`, `register_ip`,`registry`,`super_agent_id`,`user_label_id`,`vip_grade_code`,`vip_grade_up` from user_info where user_account = #{userAccount} and site_code= #{siteCode}

SELECT user_account
FROM user_info
user_account like CONCAT('%', #{userAccount}, '%')

SELECT a.user_account, a.user_label_id, a.account_type FROM user_info a
FIND_IN_SET(#{labelId}, a.user_label_id)
and a.site_code = #{siteCode}
order by created_time desc

SELECT a.id FROM user_info a
a.user_label_id is not null and a.site_code = #{siteCode} and FIND_IN_SET(#{labelId}, a.user_label_id)
order by created_time desc

SELECT t.user_account FROM (SELECT user_account, MAX(id) AS id FROM user_vip_flow_record where updated_time >= #{vipUpgradeStartTime} AND updated_time <= #{nowEndTime} GROUP BY user_account) AS a, user_vip_flow_record t, vip_grade_config t1 WHERE a.id = t.id AND t.vip_grade_code + 1 = t1.vip_grade_code AND t1.`status` = 1 AND t.updated_time >= #{vipUpgradeStartTime} AND t.updated_time <= #{nowEndTime} AND t.valid_sum_amount >= t1.bet_amount_upgrade AND t.user_account NOT IN (SELECT t2.user_account FROM vip_change_info t2 WHERE t2.change_type = 0 AND t2.change_time >= #{nowStartTime} AND t2.change_time <= #{nowEndTime})
SELECT user_id FROM user_info where user_id = #{userId} limit 1

SELECT user_id FROM user_info where user_id IN
#{id}
SELECT 1 FROM user_info where site_code = #{siteCode} and friend_invite_code = #{friendInviteCode} limit 1
SELECT t1.agent_id, t1.agent_account, t1.user_benefit FROM user_info t, agent_info t1 WHERE t.super_agent_id = t1.agent_id AND t.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT user_id FROM user_info WHERE FIND_IN_SET((SELECT id FROM site_user_label_config WHERE site_code = '0' AND label_id = #{labelId}), user_label_id) and site_code = #{siteCode}
SELECT t.user_id FROM user_info t, agent_info t1 WHERE t.super_agent_id = t1.agent_id AND t.site_code = #{siteCode} and !FIND_IN_SET(#{awardCode},t1.user_benefit)

SELECT id, user_id, user_account, password, nick_name, salt, user_name, gender, birthday, area_code, phone, phone_status, email, mail_status, main_currency, account_type, account_status, risk_level_id, first_deposit_time, first_deposit_amount, second_deposit_time, second_deposit_amount, last_login_time, last_login_ip, offline_days, online_days, register_time, member_domain, register_ip, registry, super_agent_id, super_agent_account, binding_agent_time, user_label_id, trans_agent_time, vip_grade_code, vip_rank, vip_grade_up, withdraw_pwd, acount_remark, agent_remark, avatar_code, avatar, device_no, device_control_id, last_device_no, wallet_address, change_agent_count, friend_invite_code, inviter, inviter_id, site_code, language, ip_address, auth_status, creator, created_time, updater, updated_time FROM user_info
AND id = -1
AND site_code = #{vo.siteCode}
AND INET_ATON(register_ip) >= CAST(#{vo.ipStart} AS UNSIGNED)
AND INET_ATON(register_ip) <= CAST(#{vo.ipEnd} AS UNSIGNED)

SELECT id, user_id, user_account, password, nick_name, salt, user_name, gender, birthday, area_code, phone, phone_status, email, mail_status, main_currency, account_type, account_status, risk_level_id, first_deposit_time, first_deposit_amount, second_deposit_time, second_deposit_amount, last_login_time, last_login_ip, offline_days, online_days, register_time, member_domain, register_ip, registry, super_agent_id, super_agent_account, binding_agent_time, user_label_id, trans_agent_time, vip_grade_code, vip_rank, vip_grade_up, withdraw_pwd, acount_remark, agent_remark, avatar_code, avatar, device_no, device_control_id, last_device_no, wallet_address, change_agent_count, friend_invite_code, inviter, inviter_id, site_code, language, ip_address, auth_status, creator, created_time, updater, updated_time FROM user_info
AND id = -1
AND site_code = #{vo.siteCode}
AND INET_ATON(last_login_ip) >= CAST(#{vo.ipStart} AS UNSIGNED)
AND INET_ATON(last_login_ip) <= CAST(#{vo.ipEnd} AS UNSIGNED)
